phrases.intent_en: Where is the funicular ticket counter?
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o balcão de bilhetes do funicular?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW bahl-KOWN DIH bee-LYEH-tihsh DOO foo-nee-koo-LAHR?
phrases.cultural_note: Single counter handles all services, including funicular tickets.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o funicular.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW foo-nee-koo-LAHR.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the funicular.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the funicular.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW foo-nee-koo-LAHR.
responses.french: Siga as placas para o funicular.

phrases.intent_en: Where is the giant waves information panel?
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o painel das ondas gigantes?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW peye-NEHL DUHSH OHNG-duhsh zhee-GAHNNG-tihsh?
phrases.cultural_note: Staff favor concise directional cues to maintain queue flow and service efficiency.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o painel das ondas gigantes.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW peye-NEHL DUHSH OHNG-duhsh zhee-GAHNNG-tihsh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the giant waves information panel.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the giant waves information panel.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW peye-NEHL DUHSH OHNG-duhsh zhee-GAHNNG-tihsh.
responses.french: Siga as placas para o painel das ondas gigantes.

phrases.intent_en: Where can I book a guided tour?
phrases.text_local: Onde posso reservar um passeio guiado?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo reh-zih-ruh-VAHR OONNG puh-SAYOO GEEAH-doo?
phrases.cultural_note: Portuguese staff use precise location markers and maintain a strictly professional tone.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, no balcão de reservas.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, NOO bahl-KOWN DIH reh-ZEH-ruh-vuhsh.
likely_response.translation_en: Good day, at the reservation counter.

responses.english: Good day, at the reservation counter.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, NOO bahl-KOWN DIH reh-ZEH-ruh-vuhsh.
responses.french: Bom dia, no balcão de reservas.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso encontrar a exposição de cerâmica local?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo ayng-koongt-RAHR AH ehsh-poo-zee-SOWN DIH seh-RAHN-mee-kuh loo-KAHL?

likely_response.local: Pergunte ao atendente de turismo no balcão de informações.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW uh-tayng-DAYNG-tih DIH too-REEZH-moo NOO bahl-KOWN DIH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask the tourism attendant at the information counter.

responses.english: Ask the tourism attendant at the information counter.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW uh-tayng-DAYNG-tih DIH too-REEZH-moo NOO bahl-KOWN DIH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH.
responses.french: Pergunte ao atendente de turismo no balcão de informações.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the ceramic display is
phrases.text_local: Olá, onde está a exposição de cerâmica local?
phrases.pronunciation: aw-LAH, OHNG-dih ehs-TAH AH ehsh-poo-zee-SOWN DIH seh-RAHN-mee-kuh loo-KAHL?
phrases.cultural_note: Ceramic displays are common in Portuguese tourist centers, showcasing local craftsmanship.

likely_response.local: Na sala de exposições, ao fundo.
likely_response.pronunciation: NUH SAH-luh DIH ehsh-poo-zee-SOHNYSH, OW FOONNG-doo.
likely_response.translation_en: In the exhibition room, at the back.

responses.english: In the exhibition room, at the back.
responses.phonetic: NUH SAH-luh DIH ehsh-poo-zee-SOHNYSH, OW FOONNG-doo.
responses.french: Na sala de exposições, ao fundo.

phrases.text_local: Onde compro bilhetes para o funicular?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih KOHMP-roo bee-LYEH-tihsh PUH-ruh AW foo-nee-koo-LAHR?

likely_response.local: Na bilheteira do funicular, consulte o funcionário.
likely_response.pronunciation: NUH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh DOO foo-nee-koo-LAHR, koong-SOOW-tih AW foonng-seeoo-NAHR-yoo.
likely_response.translation_en: At the funicular ticket office, ask the staff.

responses.english: At the funicular ticket office, ask the staff.
responses.phonetic: NUH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh DOO foo-nee-koo-LAHR, koong-SOOW-tih AW foonng-seeoo-NAHR-yoo.
responses.french: Na bilheteira do funicular, consulte o funcionário.

phrases.cultural_note: Information points are typically highlighted by immediate visual cues rather than verbal explanations.
